name: Beastmaster
description: I run with the rabbit and hunt with the hounds.

abilities.name: Inner Beast
abilities.description: Grants Beastmaster and his player-controlled units within the radius bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Wild Axes
abilities.description: Sends his axes flying and calls them home again, slicing through enemy units and trees along their path. Each axe can only affect the same enemy units once, and amplifies subsequent damage from Beastmaster and his units.

abilities.name: Summon Razorback
abilities.description: The Boar's attacks inflict a poison that slows the affected enemy unit's movement speed and attack speed.

abilities.name: Summon Raptors
abilities.description: Summons a hawk that orbits around Beastmaster. The Hawk dive towards the enemy unit, prioritizing heroes, dealing damage and rooting it. The dive interval corresponds to the Hawk's current attack speed and base attack time.

abilities.name: Drums of Slom
abilities.description: Grants an aura that causes successful attacks of Beastmaster and his player-controlled units to strike the drum. Every successful attack grants a stack that reduces the drum strike interval. If no attacks are made, the drum strikes gradually increases. Grants a number of Drum of Slom stacks upon a Primal Roar cast.

abilities.name: Primal Roar
abilities.description: All shoved secondary enemy units are also stunned and damaged. Both the knockback and movement speed slow area width are dynamic, and corresponds to the distance between Beastmaster and the unit-targeted enemy. The Beastmaster has learned to channel his primal instincts into an animalistic roar, causing devastation in the ranks of enemies.
